summary: Phase 7 (QR PDFs) and Phase 8 (Email templates + send-template + expiry job) tested end-to-end. All backend pytest cases pass (8/8). Frontend flows verified: QR PDF 3 designs download as 200 application/pdf; Email Template CRUD (create/edit/list/delete) works in Settings; Notify Client modal shows Template dropdown when templates exist and POSTs to /send-template returning graceful 502 (expected for demo SMTP); Phase 2-4 client gallery /s/eva-ella-27-06-26 still loads.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminGalleryDetail.js openNotify: Template dropdown is hidden entirely when templates.length===0. Consider showing a hint 'No templates yet' to guide first-time users. Not a blocker.

email.py _send raises HTTPException from a threadpool call — works, but wrapping every SMTP exception into 502 makes it hard for the frontend to distinguish auth errors vs network. Consider structured error codes.
seed_data_creation: Created & deleted TEST_UI_Tpl / TEST_UI_Tpl_Upd email templates during testing; final cleanup executed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend login endpoint is POST /api/admin/login (NOT /api/tenant/login). QR PDF endpoint: GET /api/admin/shares/{sid}/qr-pdf?design={minimal|classic|botanical}. Demo tenant SMTP is intentionally invalid, so /send-template returns HTTP 502 which is EXPECTED — verify the request is made and no crash. Reusable pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_9_phase78.py.
